commit_scope: fourth-kernel.form m4c first boot: the emitter walks a program-as-cells and emits the generic native walker beside its node table, probe included (fk_arms by tag). Proven three-way at 15; booted by the audit with value parity and the trace self-reported from inside the binary. The fk4 missing-trace question closes BY m4c, not before it: the emitted lane's first observable sibling.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-walker-emit-band.fk
local_validation.summary: The emitter holds three-way at 15: (1) the tiny program flattens to the canonical post-order table; (2) the 3-child IF row carries (cond, then, else) indices; (4) deterministic emission; (8) the FULL emitted C byte-exact — printer, fk_arms declaration, node table, generic walker with the root spliced into SELF, probe-printing main. The audit booted it: fib-as-cells through clang answers 317811 (parity with all walkers), the probe self-reports 9,254,109 dispatches by tag from inside the binary (LIT 2,056,913 / ARG 2,571,142 / ADD 514,228 / SUB 1,028,456 / LE 1,028,457 / IF 1,028,457 / SELF 1,028,456), and the rows land: fib 28 in 16.9 ms / 1.3 MB max RSS / 33 KB binary vs the three kernels' 449.8-1741.9 ms on the same recursive semantics — the meta-interpretation tax measured at ~87x in m4b collapses to one native interpretation layer, with the trace riding.

observed_delta.conditions: arm64 Darwin, clang -O2, full-process invocations, medians over 15/5/3 runs

known_limitations.limitation: fkw bakes one program per emission (fib here); sum/ack rows arrive when their programs are authored as cells — the walker text is already program-independent.
known_limitations.follow_up: A program-loading port (read the node table through the afferent door) makes one fkw serve any program; lands when a consumer asks.

known_limitations.limitation: The probe is arm counters; the NodeID provenance plane (framebuffer sibling) is named in the gate but not yet emitted.
known_limitations.follow_up: m4d-adjacent: emit the provenance write beside each dispatch, read through the port door.

known_limitations.limitation: validate.sh fourth-arm wiring is open: fkw proves parity through the audit, not yet inside validate.sh's per-sample loop.
known_limitations.follow_up: Wire fkw as an optional fourth arm for the band families its op set covers.

known_limitations.limitation: m4d self-emission needs the op set to grow string/emit ops so the walker can run the emitter on itself.
known_limitations.follow_up: The fixpoint band: same content-address in, byte-identical source out.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run the three-way band; the audit is operational tooling runnable wherever clang exists.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The body gains the m4c emitted walker: a native binary emitted entirely from Form recipes that walks content-addressed programs with its probe inside — the emitted lane's darkness (fk4) closes by construction, and the tax-collapse is now measurable per milestone.
test_flows: fourth-walker-emit-band proves table flatten (incl. 3-child IF), determinism, and byte-exact full emission, three-way at 15.
fourth_kernel_audit.sh boots the emitted walker: parity 317811 gates the rows; the probe prints from inside the binary; medians and RSS recorded with conditions.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh three-way 1 ok 0 divergent; audit end-to-end emit -> clang -> parity -> probe -> rows.

phase_gate.gate: the emitted walker boots with parity and its probe inside; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: m4d — grow the op set (string/emit ops) so the booted walker runs the emitter on itself: byte-identical self-emission, the fixpoint
